name: . ۫ 在 ི۪۪  HYUNG LINE
description:
“Asked me if I do this everyday, I said, ‘often’”

- Often, The Weeknd

Valentine’s Day wasn’t any different than any other time you went to their shared space.

All four of them invited you over to their apartment to have their own celebration. It’s just that this time, they gifted you a box of chocolates.

It was only until you ate half of the box that they told you they were aphrodisiacs.
